title: pouteria citriodora
intro: Pouteria citriodora, also known as the lemon scented satinash, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The medicinal properties of Pouteria citriodora lie in its essential oils, which contain citral and limonene, compounds known for their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pouteria citriodora can be prepared for herbal use through steam distillation of its leaves to produce an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, or through infusion of its leaves in hot water to create a tea.
